calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition For Order Entitlement
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John A. Mangini, Esq., of the Law Offices of John A. Mangini, Tel. 650.876.0188, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER IRA BLOOM'S Petition For Order Entitlement is Granted. No opposition filed and petitioner has shown compliance with Code of Civil Procedure 1355 and entitled to the order he seeks. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition For Order Entitlement
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To Mar-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John A. Mangini, Esq., of the Law Offices of John A. Mangini, Tel. 650.876.0188, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The matter was discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PETITIONER IRA BLOOM'S Hearing Re: Petition For Order Entitlement is continued to Mar. 19, 2012. Any filing by plaintiff is due on Mar. 14, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
